data.name: Heartstone Veins
data.properties: Deep veins of a ruby-like mineral that glows with a faint inner warmth.

data.name: Gloomshroom Caverns
data.properties: Vast underground caves filled with bioluminescent fungi.

data.name: Grund, the Stone Father
data.description: The chief deity of the dwarves.

data.name: The Great Anvil
data.description: A mountain with a perfectly flat top, said to be the anvil where Grund forged the first dwarves.

data.name: Iron-Hand Clan
data.description: The Iron-Hand Clan is known for its unyielding traditionalism.

data.name: Khaz-Grund
data.description: The capital city carved into the heart of the mountain.

data.name: The Low Rumble
data.description: A minor earthquake revealed a vast, unexplored cave system rich with glowing crystals.

data.name: Whisperwood Trees
data.properties: Ancient trees with silver leaves that rustle with faint, melodic whispers.

data.name: Aethel, the Star-Weaver
data.description: A deity of magic, prophecy, and the night sky.

data.name: Silverwood Sentinels
data.description: The Silverwood Sentinels are patient and graceful.

data.name: Rage-Iron Deposits
data.properties: A dark, volatile metal that strengthens when heated by anger or battle-fury.

data.name: Kargoth, The Unchained
data.description: The orcish god of pure, untamed strength.

data.name: The Broken Tusk Horde
data.theme: A powerful horde united by strength.
data.description: The Horde values individual power and glory.

data.name: Sunken City of Aztlan
data.properties: The ruins of an ancient city just off the coast, filled with coral-encrusted treasures.

data.name: Solara, the Ever-Light
data.symbol: A golden sun with seven rays
data.description: Goddess of the sun, commerce, and civilization.

data.name: The Republic of Sol
data.theme: A thriving coastal republic built on trade.
data.description: An ambitious and adaptable human republic.
